## Checklist

- [ ] Follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] Tests added/updated in `tests/`
- [ ] `experiments/registry.md` updated (if experiment)
- [ ] `docs/submission-log.md` updated (if submission)
- [ ] Hypothesis referenced (H1–H4) if experiment tests one
- [ ] Phase note updated with `## Lessons Learned` and `## Failed Attempts`
- [ ] Author has run `pytest tests/` and `ruff check .` locally
